title: FrootAI Skill Schema
description: Validates YAML frontmatter for SKILL.md files — self-contained capabilities bundled as folders.

name.description: Kebab-case identifier that MUST match the parent folder name. Example: 'frootai-play-initializer' must live in skills/frootai-play-initializer/.

description.description: Single-line description of what this skill does. Displayed in marketplace and discovery UI.
